text: IDEA LAB is a research laboratory at Hanyang University ERICA, founded by Assistant Professor Sunwoong Yang. The lab focuses on physics-guided AI to accelerate engineering simulation and design.
IDEA LAB's slogan: We shape IDEAs into IDEAL design solutions. And AI is our design engine.
IDEA LAB's vision: IDEA LAB Realizes Design IDEAs with AI-Driven Design Framework.
IDEA LAB's goal is to go from ideas to ideal designs. The lab leverages AI to explore creative designs and rapidly evaluate them, identifying ideal solutions.
IDEA LAB's Approach 1: From data-driven AI to knowledge-driven AI. The lab embeds domain experts' experience and know-how so models learn from real production constraints.
IDEA LAB's Approach 2: From physics-blind AI to physics-guided AI. The lab enforces governing equations and physical constraints, ensuring physically reliable and explainable AI.
IDEA LAB's application scope ranges from ground to space. The lab redefines engineering design with its AI framework for physical systems, from ground to space.
IDEA LAB's research focus is Physics-Guided AI for Engineering Simulation & Design.
IDEA LAB builds AI models grounded in physical knowledge to speed up simulations, predict future physical behavior, and guide trustworthy design decisions.
IDEA LAB's research keywords include: AI-based Simulation, Physics-guided AI, Long-term Forecasting, Uncertainty Quantification, and Generative Design.
IDEA LAB integrates physical understanding with reliable AI workflows to speed up simulations, predict future physical behavior, and guide better design decisions.
Key Component 1 - Simulation: Computer simulations provide physics-consistent data that anchor AI models to real engineering behavior.
Key Component 2 - AI Modeling: AI models learn how physical systems behave by capturing patterns and rules, not just fitting data points.
Key Component 3 - AI Prediction: Trained AI models forecast how systems evolve over time, turning simulation knowledge into usable future insight.
Key Component 4 - Design Optimization: AI connects prediction to decision-making by searching for better designs under physical and practical constraints.
IDEA LAB Signature AI Technique 1 - Data-Independent AI: AI remains reliable even with limited, noisy, or inconsistent data, so its performance does not depend on a specific setup.
IDEA LAB Signature AI Technique 2 - Long-Term Forecasting: AI predicts future physical behavior over long time horizons while staying consistent with physical trends.
IDEA LAB Signature AI Technique 3 - Uncertainty Quantification: AI quantifies uncertainty to inform how much confidence engineers should have in each prediction.
IDEA LAB Signature AI Technique 4 - Generative Design: AI suggests numerous novel design candidates, enabling efficient discovery of high-performing designs.
IDEA LAB projects connect engineering, design, and AI across multiple disciplines including aerospace, automotive, manufacturing, and more.

Ongoing Project (PI: Sunwoong Yang). Sponsor: Korea Aerospace Industries (KAI). Title: Development of an AI-based Framework for Aerodynamic Prediction and Design of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles. Period & Funding: 2026.03.01 ~ 2027.02.28 (1 year, 20,000,000 KRW).

Ongoing Project (PI: Sunwoong Yang). Sponsor: National Research Foundation of Korea (Sejong Fellowship). Title: Development of AI-based Flow Prediction Framework Considering Versatility and User-Friendliness in Digital Twins. Period & Funding: 2024.05.01 ~ 2029.04.30 (5 years, 500,000,000 KRW).

Ongoing Project (PI: Sunwoong Yang). Sponsor: Hanyang University. Title: AI-based Aerodynamic Design of a Helicopter Blade for Mars Exploration. Period & Funding: 2026.03.01 ~ 2027.02.28 (1 year, 40,000,000 KRW).

Completed Project (PI: Sunwoong Yang). Sponsor: Korea Institute of Industrial Technology (KITECH). Title: Development of AI algorithms for preform design for blow molding. Period & Funding: 2024.05.08 ~ 2024.08.31 (4 months, 20,000,000 KRW).

Sunwoong Yang is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Mechanical Engineering at Hanyang University ERICA since March 2026, following a postdoctoral appointment at KAIST. His research advances AI-powered methods that accelerate mechanical design and make engineering decisions more reliable.
Prof. Sunwoong Yang's contact: Email: sunwoongy@hanyang.ac.kr. Office location: 5공학관 211호, Hanyang University ERICA.

Prof. Sunwoong Yang earned his Ph.D. from Seoul National University (March 2020 – August 2023) in the Department of Aerospace Engineering, supervised by Prof. Kwanjung Yee. Thesis: 'Efficient Aerodynamic Design via Data-driven Approaches'. Received the Outstanding Doctoral Dissertation Award at SNU.

Prof. Sunwoong Yang earned his M.S. from Seoul National University (March 2018 – February 2020) in the Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, supervised by Prof. Kwanjung Yee. Thesis: 'Planform Optimization of UCAV Considering Longitudinal Stability and Low-observability Using Variable-fidelity'.
Prof. Sunwoong Yang earned his B.S. from Seoul National University (March 2014 – February 2018) in the Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering.
Prof. Sunwoong Yang is currently an Assistant Professor at Hanyang University (March 2026 – Present), Department of Mechanical Engineering.

Prof. Sunwoong Yang was a Postdoctoral Researcher at KAIST (September 2023 – February 2026) in the CCS Graduate School of Mobility, supervised by Prof. Namwoo Kang, funded by the Sejong Fellowship (NRF, May 2024 – April 2029).

In the 2026 Spring Semester, Prof. Sunwoong Yang teaches Computer-based Design (82 students) and Mechanical Design (42 students) at Hanyang University ERICA, for a total of 124 students.
IDEA LAB researchers: 정승한 (Jung Seunghan) – Undergraduate Intern, ERICA Mechanical Engineering, Prospective M.S. (2027.03).
IDEA LAB researchers: 최민혁 (Choi Minhyuk) – Undergraduate Intern, ERICA Mechanical Engineering, Prospective M.S. (2028.03). Quote: 'Wanna become a Defense-AI Engineer'.

News (May 7, 2026): Prof. Yang delivered an invited talk at the KSME CAE Division Conference in Yeosu, Korea. The presentation titled 'Aerodynamic Design Optimization of Martian Rotorcraft Airfoil' introduced AI-based aerodynamic shape optimization strategies for rotorcraft airfoils operating in the extremely low-density Martian atmosphere.

News (March 20, 2026): IDEA LAB was recognized in Hanyang University's '한양의 우수연구자 (금주의 우수논문)' spotlight for the third week of March 2026. The featured paper, 'Mesh-agnostic prediction of unsteady flow dynamics using graph U-Nets', was published in Expert Systems with Applications. It demonstrates a graph-based U-Net architecture that predicts complex unsteady flow fields without relying on mesh-specific training data.

News (March 1, 2026): Sunwoong Yang joined the Department of Mechanical Engineering at Hanyang University ERICA as an Assistant Professor, officially launching IDEA LAB (Intelligent Design for Engineering Applications Lab).
IDEA LAB 초기 멤버 모집: AI 기술로 공학 설계의 패러다임을 바꿀 IDEA LAB이 첫 발을 내디뎠습니다. AI 설계의 새로운 기준을 세우며, 연구실의 문화를 함께 정립해 나갈 주도적이고 열정 넘치는 동료를 모집합니다.
IDEA LAB은 항공우주, 국방, 제조, 자동차, 연료전지 등 다양한 분야의 공학 시뮬레이션·설계 자동화/자율화 연구에 함께할 대학원생 및 학부연구생을 모집합니다. 문의: sunwoongy@hanyang.ac.kr
IDEA LAB FAQ - 연구실 문화: IDEA LAB은 이제 막 기반을 다지기 시작한 연구실로, 젊은 지도교수의 추진력을 바탕으로 열린 의사소통과 빠른 실행을 최우선에 둡니다. 지도교수가 제공하는 체계적인 코칭과 연구 로드맵으로 방황 없이 성장할 수 있는 환경을 제공하며, 혁신적인 AI 설계 연구를 추구합니다.

IDEA LAB FAQ - 기계공학과에서 AI 연구의 중요성: AI를 활용하지 못하는 엔지니어는 AI를 쓸 줄 아는 엔지니어로 대체될 것입니다. IDEA LAB은 AI를 활용하는 엔지니어들이 각 공학 현장의 문제, 데이터, 물리적 특성에 맞게 사용할 수 있는 AI 기술을 직접 설계하고 개발하는 데 집중합니다. IDEA LAB의 졸업생은 AI에 밀리는 엔지니어가 아니라, 산업이 필요로 하는 AI를 만드는 엔지니어로 성장합니다.
IDEA LAB FAQ - AI 경험 필요 여부: AI 경험은 필수가 아닙니다. 지도교수는 AI를 처음 접하는 학생도 빠르게 실전 연구에 투입될 수 있도록 노하우를 직접 전수합니다. 단, 열린 의사소통과 배우고자 하는 열의는 필수입니다.

IDEA LAB FAQ - 다른 분야 관심: 우리 연구실은 기계·항공 산업 현장에서 실제로 제기되는 요구를 토대로 문제를 정의하고 그에 맞는 AI 접근법을 설계합니다. 로봇 동역학, 자동차 충돌 해석, EV 배터리·모터, 반도체 설계 등 관심 있는 영역을 깊이 있게 다룰 수 있도록 학습을 지원합니다. 각 분야 국내 전문가와의 공동연구를 직접 매칭해 드립니다.
IDEA LAB 모집 트랙: 석박통합과정 (입학 전 최소 6개월 학부연구생 권장), 석사과정 (입학 전 최소 3개월 학부연구생 권장), 박사과정 (석사 전공분야를 AI 설계 대상으로 활용하여 빠르게 본인만의 연구를 기획하고자 하는 분 환영), 학부연구생 (3학년 이상 지원 가능).
IDEA LAB 연구 주제 결정 방식: 지원자가 목표하는 커리어를 고려한 연구 주제 및 연구 과제 매칭을 원칙으로 합니다. 초기 상담을 통해 관심 영역과 목표 커리어를 충분히 공유한 뒤, 지도교수가 연구 과제와 협업 파트너를 직접 매칭합니다.

IDEA LAB 혜택: 산학 프로젝트 (자동차·반도체·항공우주·방산 등), 논문 지도 (연구실 투입 후 2년 내 SCI(E) 논문 게재 목표), 국내외 학회 지원, 공동연구 기회 (서울대학교, KAIST, POSTECH, 독일항공우주센터 DLR, Purdue University, University of Michigan 등), AI 구독료 지원 (매달 13만원으로 ChatGPT, Claude, Google AI Pro 등 사용), 기타 복지 (논문 인센티브, 프로젝트 수행 인센티브, 코어타임 10시-16시 운영, 커피머신).
